case_title: TIMOTHY OBLER VS. THE CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO DISMISS WITHOUT PREJUDICE: NO APPEARANCES

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF OBLER, TIMOTHY ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF. NO APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. NO PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID LAVINE; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY OBLER, TIMOTHY AS TO DEFENDANT THE CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-06-2023 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
